home.title: Chandankumar shares practical insights for growth and meaningful work.
home.subtitle: Helping people learn faster, build better habits, and turn experience into repeatable progress.
home.quickIntroText: Chandankumar is a builder and lifelong learner focused on sharing practical lessons from real projects. This section will highlight his journey and experiences.
home.highlightsSubtitle: A quick look at current focus areas and ongoing work.

highlights.title: Audience Growth Playbook
highlights.description: A practical framework for turning content into consistent subscriber growth.

highlights.title: Learning Sprint Journal
highlights.description: Weekly notes that document experiments, lessons, and measurable progress.

highlights.title: Creator Systems Setup
highlights.description: A simple operating system for publishing quality work without burnout.

about.pageSubtitle: This page shares the story, values, and direction behind the work.
about.personalStoryText: This section will highlight my journey and experiences. It will explain what inspired me to start building projects and sharing what I learn with others.
about.journeyText: The background details will be expanded soon, including key milestones, lessons from challenges, and how each phase shaped my current approach to growth and execution.
about.valuesText: I value clarity, consistency, and real-world impact. My interests include learning systems, writing, and creating practical resources that help people move forward with confidence.

projects.pageSubtitle: Details about these projects will be expanded soon with deeper case studies.

items.title: Newsletter Growth Dashboard
items.problem: Tracking subscriber trends manually consumed too much time.
items.workDone: Built a clean dashboard prototype to visualize growth metrics weekly.
items.outcome: Faster decisions and better clarity on content performance.

items.title: Learning Library System
items.problem: Useful lessons from books and projects were scattered across notes.
items.workDone: Created a structured personal knowledge workflow with reusable templates.
items.outcome: Improved recall and easier publishing of practical insights.

items.title: Creator Workflow Optimization
items.problem: Content creation lacked consistency and clear publishing rhythm.
items.workDone: Designed a repeatable weekly process for planning, writing, and review.
items.outcome: More consistent output and less decision fatigue.

items.title: Community Feedback Loop
items.problem: Audience questions were not feeding back into future content.
items.workDone: Set up a lightweight feedback collection and prioritization process.
items.outcome: Better topic relevance and stronger trust with readers.

newsletter.compactDescription: Short, actionable notes delivered every week.

newsletter.homeDescription: Each email includes honest lessons, useful frameworks, and practical next steps.
